title: Evidence Thread Card
prompt:
Create a production-ready Evidence Thread Card using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a concise research card with three numbered evidence notes connected by a vertical thread. Selecting a note widens its small detail area and moves an amber thread marker to that point, making the supporting claim easy to scan. Use a white Bento card over #F4F5F6, #ECECEE dividers, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 headings, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Amber is the only bright accent. The card itself must not have a gradient, and the selected note must be identifiable with text and shape in addition to color.

Use a labelled group of real buttons, each at least 44px high with aria-pressed. Click, Enter, and Space select the corresponding evidence note, and a polite live region announces its title. Hover may lift a note 2px over 180ms; press may compress it 1px over 90ms. Animate the marker and expanded detail with a spring using stiffness 320 and damping 26, then fade supporting copy over 170ms. Do not use timers, random data, browser storage, remote assets, or network requests. Keep the initial state useful and deterministic.

At 320px, stack each note and ensure its title never clips; at larger widths preserve calm whitespace around the narrow thread. Keep a logical tab sequence, a visible 3px dark focus ring, and AA contrast. Prefer transform and opacity. Respect prefers-reduced-motion using instant selection or a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML: <section class="uiwiki-thread"><button aria-pressed="true">1. Source audit</button></section> */
.uiwiki-thread{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-thread button{display:block;min-height:44px;width:100%;margin:8px 0;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;text-align:left;font-weight:800;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-thread button[aria-pressed="true"]{border-left:4px solid #f59e0b}.uiwiki-thread button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-thread button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-thread button{transition:none}}

demoCode:
